history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, black and white, low-angle, portrait of a young man with dark, messy hair. He is wearing a black t-shirt and resting his chin on his hand, with his fingers touching his lips. His eyes are looking directly at the camera with a contemplative or melancholic expression. The background is a plain, light-colored wall with a black wire or cord hanging vertically near the left edge of the frame. The lighting is dramatic, casting shadows on his face and highlighting the texture of his hair and skin. The overall mood is introspective and slightly moody. --ar 1:1 --style raw
